title: aquilegia pyrenaica var. kitaibelii
intro: Aquilegia pyrenaica var. kitaibelii, also known as the Pyrenean columbine, is a flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aquilegia pyrenaica var. kitaibelii include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
